data.name: Kinky Phone - Swipe to Seduce
data.detailed_description:
🔥WELCOME TO THE ULTIMATE DATING SIM🔥

A strategic dating simulator where matching is just the beginning.

Browse 20 unique profiles on the Kinky app, featuring 85+ kinks and fetishes. Potential partners openly share their desires, letting you dive straight into what makes each connection exciting.

Master the art of flirty negotiation and plan dates that go beyond small talk. Every date plays out in full, so you can see how it actually went and just how well it ended 😉

The twist? Recording is part of the experience. With full mutual consent, you capture your encounters, build a personal gallery of your hottest memories, replay key moments, and use what you learn about each partner’s desires to unlock even bolder, deeper connections.

📱YOUR PHONE, YOUR RULES 📱

Welcome to your digital playground. Everything happens on your in-game smartphone .

  • 🔥 THE KINKY APP (The Main Event)

  • 👭 Characters: 20 unique characters with 85+ kinks having distinct personalities

  • 👉 Swipe to Start: Use your mouse or arrow keys. Right for "Hell yes," left for "Next!"

  • 📋 Deep Profile Dives: Study their pics, bios, kinks, and Q&As before you decide

  • 🎯 Kink Filter System: Not your thing? Filter it out. Build your perfect dating pool

  • 💬 Match & Message: The real game begins now. Charm them into meeting IRL

  • 🗣️ Dynamic Chat System: Too flirty: Scared off. Too cool: Lost interest.

  • 🎬 Date: First-person POV romantic date recordings

  • ♾️ Endless Possibilities: All the girls will respond the way you treat them

  • 🎨Animations: High-quality artwork and smooth animations

  • 🖼️ THE GALLERY (Your Private Collection)

Every picture, video, and animation you unlock is automatically saved here. Your digital scrapbook of romantic conquests. Revisit your greatest hits anytime.

🎨 CUSTOMIZATION APPS

  • Wallpaper App: Unlock special images and personalize your phone screen

  • Music App: Set the perfect vibe for your swiping sessions

💋 MEET THE CAST💋

20 Unique Women | 85+ Kinks | Zero Boring Conversations

Your matches aren't just pretty faces .They're fully realized characters with distinct personalities, desires, and quirks from vanilla to adventurous, from mainstream to niche.

  • 📖 Lily: The Blushing Virgin - Old-school romantic who needs safety and trust before her first real adventure

  • 😒 Kira: The God Complex Tsundere - Has an attitude problem and expects you to fix it… if you’re worthy

  • 📚 Chloe: The Campus Homewrecker - Her boyfriend studies. She doesn’t. Loves noise complaints and secrets

  • 🖤 Raven: The Goth Goddess - Lives for dark aesthetics and darker desires. Kneel, and she might be generous

  • 🏀 Alex: The Confused Tomboy - Beats you at FIFA, wears backwards caps, then gets flustered about feelings

  • 🎁 Jamie: The Surprising Package - Built differently and confident about it. “Want to see who’s bigger?”

  • 💪 Dana: The Gym Domme - Strong enough to lift you, smart enough to know exactly what she wants

  • 🔪 Maya: The Obsessive Lover - When she loves, she loves forever. Your GPS coordinates would be romantic

  • 💅 Skylar: The Pretty Trap - Eyeliner sharper than your pickup lines. Gender’s negotiable, confidence isn’t

  • 🌸 Anna: The Wholesome Divorcée - Starting over with hope. Still Googles what “Netflix & chill” means

  • 👻 Elara: The Ghost Girl - Sleeps in basements, hasn’t blinked in three minutes. Touch proves she’s real

  • 💍 Sophia: The Bored Housewife - Picture-perfect marriage missing the passion. Seeks discreet “conversations”

  • 🎀 Tiffanyi: The Happy Bimbo - Pretty is her superpower. The more attention, the better. Let’s party

  • 🐾 Zoe: The Pet Player - Bring a leash and laser pointer. Promises not to shed much. Good girl guaranteed

  • 📱 Emma: The Clingy Romantic - Long-distance lover who refreshes your Last Seen. “It’s dedication, not stalking”

  • 👑 Victoria: The Mean Rich Girl - You’re lucky she’s talking to you. Now buy her something and know your place

  • 🎭 Riley: The Public Performer - Cosplays as a nun to scandalize strangers. Every moment deserves an audience

  • 🍂 Sam: The Soft Femboy - More feminine than all the girls you’ve met, wants to feel pretty and protected

  • 🧗‍♀️ Nina: The Pocket Rocket - Small but mighty thrill-seeker. Needs someone tall to climb… in public

  • 💄 Symphony: The Gold Digger GF - Campus sweetheart with a boyfriend who doesn’t know he’s losing

Each character has:

  • ✨ Unique personality and dialogue

  • 🔥 Specific kinks and preferences

  • 💬 Dynamic conversation paths

  • 🎬 Exclusive unlockable content

WHY YOU NEED THIS GAME

Because Reality is Boring. Here, YOU'RE in control:

  • The ultimate wingman in your pocket

  • 20 potential matches ready to meet

  • A judgment-free gallery to store your conquests

  • Endless replayability with multiple paths

  • Fresh content with every playthrough

  • READY TO START SWIPING?

  • Swipe. Match. Chat. Record. Seduce. Repeat.

💖 YOUR HAREM, YOUR RULES 💖

So will you be:

  • A loyal boyfriend to one special girl?

  • A charismatic player juggling multiple lovers?

  • Managing the beautiful chaos of polyamory?

  • The choice is entirely yours.

Your digital dating empire awaits. Every choice matters. Every conversation counts. Every date could be the one.

Download now and become the ultimate player.

From the “Sugar & Sin Games”

data.short_description: A strategic dating simulator where matching is just the beginning. Browse 20 unique profiles on the Kinky app, featuring 85 kinks and fetishes. Potential partners openly share their desires, letting you dive straight into what makes each connection exciting. Go on a date with all the girls you like.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 (64-bit) or newer
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.9 (Mavericks) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04 or newer / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Dual-Core processor
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
